sourceContract.rowGenerationBrief: Tofu Tortoise idle row-generation pass: compact heavyweight defensive guard with subtle breathing, low grounded legs, tofu-shell torso mass, small head, stubby limbs, and calm comic fighting-game confidence.
sourceContract.motionLanguage: slow shell-mass guard sway, tiny head bob, low foot shuffle, stable silhouette, no limb elongation

pipeline.command: Built-in Codex imagegen generated one idle candidate row only.

/Users/oussmustaine/.cache/codex-runtimes/codex-primary-runtime/dependencies/python/bin/python3 /Users/oussmustaine/.codex/skills/.system/imagegen/scripts/remove_chroma_key.py --input output/imagegen/tortoise-tofu-idle.png --out output/imagegen/tortoise-tofu-idle-keyed.png --auto-key border --soft-matte --transparent-threshold 12 --opaque-threshold 220 --despill; accepted keyed matte copied to output/imagegen/tortoise-tofu-idle.png for normalization.

checks.evidence: Accepted source and normalized proof are exact 2048x256 alpha PNGs, eight 256x256 cells.
Frames preserve compact tortoise mass, tofu-shell torso, small head, stubby legs, warm cream-and-green palette, and calm guard stance.
Per-frame alpha bounds stay within 163-165px width and 230px height; this row becomes the future Tofu scale reference.
Chroma key was removed from the normalized spritesheet; accepted source has alpha and visible green spill pixels are zero in every frame.
public/assets/generated/fighters/tortoise-tofu exists: false. Tofu remains absent from runtime public assets.

verdict: Accepted as the source-only Tofu idle scale baseline. Do not use for runtime promotion until all required rows pass later QA and smoke.
